# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile for a Node.js application that needs various system utilities. Install Node.js, build tools, and other dependencies using apt-get. Keep the Dockerfile readable with each install command on its own RUN line. This is for our development and production environments.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update
RUN apt-get install -y curl ca-certificates gnupg lsb-release
RUN apt-get install -y build-essential python3 make g++ git
RUN apt-get install -y bash nano vim less procps iproute2 net-tools
RUN apt-get install -y unzip zip tar gzip xz-utils
RUN apt-get install -y openssl libssl-dev
RUN apt-get install -y pkg-config
RUN apt-get install -y libc6-dev
RUN apt-get install -y docker.io
RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | bash -
RUN apt-get install -y nodejs
RUN npm install -g npm@latest
RUN apt-get clean
RUN rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm install

COPY . .

EXPOSE 3000

CMD ["npm", "start"]
